short_summary: Iran deal may shift US focus away
rationale: The imminent US-Iran deal signing is a qualitative shift that could further divert US diplomatic and financial attention from Ukraine, while Ukraine's own strikes on Russian energy infrastructure represent an active military development.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal scheduled to be signed Sunday — Trump confirms
top_events.summary: A signed US-Iran deal marks a major US foreign policy pivot that risks reducing Washington's focus and resources available for Ukraine's war effort at a critical time.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's active strikes on Russian energy infrastructure signal continued offensive capability and intent, directly relevant to the war's trajectory for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — ongoing combat
top_events.summary: Active war continues across Ukrainian territory with no qualitative change in frontline dynamics this cycle.
